member.name: T:AbilityKit.Core.Snapshots.Routing.FrameSnapshotDispatcher
member.summary:
Dispatches snapshot envelopes by opCode.
Notes: - This type is transport/session agnostic. Call to push envelopes into it. - Decoding is registered per opCode, and handlers subscribe to typed payloads.

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Core.Snapshots.Routing.ISnapshotDispatcher
member.summary: Minimal interface for snapshot dispatching, allowing View Runtime to provide its own FrameSnapshotDispatcher implementation that subscribes to BattleLogicSession.

member.name: E:AbilityKit.Core.Snapshots.Routing.ISnapshotDispatcher.SnapshotReceived
member.summary: Event fired when a snapshot envelope is received.

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Core.Snapshots.Routing.ISnapshotDispatcher.Subscribe``1(System.Int32,System.Action{AbilityKit.Ability.Host.ISnapshotEnvelope,``0})
member.summary: Subscribe to a specific snapshot type.

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Core.Snapshots.Routing.SnapshotPipeline
member.summary:
A typed, ordered pipeline for handling snapshots.
Register opCode decoders first, then add one or more ordered stages.
